Soft but can be too short for some These pants, as others have mentioned, have a wonderful yoga pants-like texture, with LOTS of stretch all over (both in the waistband and in the legs). That being said, as others have mentioned, they are in fact not tall girl friendly and will run too short if you’re anything above 5’6”. If I keep them where it’s comfortable on my waist, they are a tad bit short but I am able to style it well overall. They were able to be steamed with no issue and had minor fraying that did not impact the integrity of the pants. For me, they’re a great compromise because I expected a much rougher texture than what they actually are, and are incredibly comfortable to wear. They look great but if you are self conscious about your stomach, you may want to pair with some shapewear since there’s no compression or shaping in these pants.

I love these pants they are so comfortable. The fabric is soft and comfy and stretchy so you don't feel like you are constricted. They look great with a dress shirt or even a casual shirt. They are made of quality material all seams are strong and no separating. I wore these pants at a meeting they were so comfortable I wore them home on the plane with flip flops. The length was little long but not bad I am only 5'5 so I always have that issue. They washed well no wrinkles at all just took them out of the dryer and hung them up. If you are needing a good pair of casual work pants I highly recommend!

Comfortable work pants These pants easily became one of my new favorite work pants. As we all know, the comfier a work outfit, the better the day! They are the perfect blend of comfort and professionalism. I ordered a medium (150lbs / 5"6 for reference) and they fit snug like a glove. I love the fit especially with the high-rise waist. The hidden elastic waistband gives a smooth fit and makes them extremely comfortable for sitting at a desk all day. The straight leg cut is flattering without being too tight, and they look polished enough for work while luckily still feeling stretchy like yoga pants. Made from polyester and spandex, these are perfectly soft and breathable. I love that the pockets are not only actually functional, but really deep as well. The overall design is simple, versatile, and a perfect addition to any closet!

So Comfortable! These viehunt Womens Straight Leg Stretchy Dress Work Pants really surprised me. They feel so comfortable, but don't look it at all. The fabric is thicker than leggings, and heavier, but it also feels almost buttery soft like some leggings. The pants have a lot of stretch to them, but the straight leg cut makes them hang in a way that doesn't look it. They are a thick, slick but not shiny material that I find often used for dresses and jumpers. They have a button and zipper, like any dress pant, but could absolutely be pulled on as well - that's how stretchy and forgiving they are. I am normally a 12-14 and I am 5'9". I ordered the XL because I was concerned about length - and I am glad that I did. They are just about the perfect length, though I can make them appear longer if I slide them down a bit. At the waist, that is comfortable, but the crotch does feel over low when I try to scoot them down to add length. Overall, with dress shoes, them being a titch too short won't matter or be obvious at all. These are definitely pants I will wear for stuffy settings - no one will ever be able to tell how comfortable they are!

Most comfortable work pants ever ! I finally found a pair of work slacks that really feel like yoga pants. These pants are lightweight, breathable and with the right amount of stretch. As you move they feel like a second skin. Perfect for hot humid days. I got a M- gray, the color I got is elegant and the fit is very comfortable. The slacks have an elastic waistband at the back and deep front pockets that fit my S23 Ultra, plus two back pockets that enhance my rear. At 5'5 the length is about 29" falling right at my ankles. Their high waisted style provides me with a smooth, flattering look fit, without a muffin top. I love this material because its 20% stretch makes it perfect for the office, and I don't have to worry about wrinkles, bending, or ironing. These are professionally styled and I'm happy I got them. At that value you should get a few colors.

I have a physically demanding job, but still need to dress up. These pants are perfect for work. At first I thought they would be too tight, but they are stretchy. I usually wear a size 18 and ordered an XXL in these pants and they fit perfectly. Also I am 5'8 and the length is just right on me.

I don’t love the collared top on me though, plus the color isn’t what I was looking for so I’ll be returning.

Omg this deserves 27 stars. Get it. It's the softest, most luxurious feeling fabric. I'm 5'5, 155ish lbs, and usually wear a large. The large was a bit oversized. Super awesome set! I’m 5’3” around 145 lbs with 38DD. I purchased size large cause of the large bust, which is a good call cause the top isn’t overly long. so the pants are a bit large on me but since they have that jogger style cuffed ankle, I’m not dragging the pants on the ground. I love it, I’ve washed it once and no issues, the fabric is so soft and silky but not too heavy. I’m buying it in the taupetastic color right now. Buy it! you will love it!

Wrinkle-free and comfortable This will be a great outfit for travel or lounging, but nice enough to wear when running errands. Fabric is medium weight and soft - I have seen it described as “scuba” fabric. I am 5’5” and 190, and XL fits perfectly. Pants are usually too long, but these are the correct length for a 28-29” inseam. The cuff on the pants helps it make the pant legs more trim. I bought the taupe color, and I would describe it as more of a dusty rose color. There were very few wrinkles out of the package and after a wash/dry, there will not be any wrinkles.

Better for Men - not short Women 5'3" and the waist band is in my upper abdomen. The back-waist dips away, so it doesn't fit naturally on my sway-back round bottom. Thick thighs feel a bit snug. These are Medium on my 5'3" 172 lbs. The small would've been too tight and Large too big! Color is a nice brown. Material feels cooling for hot/warm weather but to thin for cold climates - very thin!! Roomy pockets! Waist ties securely! Would fit well on any Tall person or 5'7" Tall person. Doesn't work for me. Sadly, I have to return. May be a better fit for you!

Advice for Ladies that are ~5’4” and weigh around 65 kg The product is exactly what you expect. It’s slightly tighter around the waist, it goes above the navel, slightly long and baggy at the bottom. I am 5’4” and weigh 65kg. If you have a small butt then your butt will look pretty flat, it’s not ugly flat tho. If you are a female around my height I would recommend a small short. A medium for a hip size above 35inches would be too large. As for material, the best I can compare it to would be a shower curtain. It’s a pretty thin material.So if you wear a women’s size 7 or 8 in regular jeans I highly recommend these because they are pretty cheap compared to the others.

Quality and next day delivery I like the texture and length, is a little big on the waist ( M size ) but when pulling strings it fits better. Quality made, I like this brand - Cherokee workwear. length is just right' waist is a little big for 160 lbs. 5'11" kind of guy but when you pull strings is alright. Will buy more from this seller. My waist is at 32 in.

Thick thighs and a booty beware. Ordered a size large as suggested on the chart. I’m 5”10 and 200 lbs. Was hard to pull over my thighs and butt but once I got past that they fit great. Plenty of room in the waist. And plenty long. A little see through if going with the white color.

“I’ll only wear these for Halloween” lol *adds more to cart* I LOVE these jeans!! I actually bought them for my Halloween costume (Joyce-Stranger things) and thought for the price and wearing them one day it was fine. Little did I know I would now be coming back to buy more in other shades. I am 5’4”, 155 lbs, and got a size 12 based off measurements I took. I was on my period so I do think a 10 would fit me as well, because there is comfy stretch to these pants. They are truly high waisted but I love that. Classic mom jeans win with extra stretch and comfort. After wearing them several hours walking around trick or treating, they did loosen like most jeans too, so that’s another reason I want to try a size 10. But with my weight fluctuations these will remain a commonly worn pair of pants. Hard to tell in the photos how high the waist is. But you can see there’s some looseness in the legs after 3 hours of wearing them when the pic was taken. I also felt the regular length was fine for someone on the shorter side. Classic 80’s fit, which is perfect for what I was looking for.

Fit great and nice and comfy! I sized up because sometimes I wear a 4 nowadays but some sizes run small in jeans and I kind of expected that with these jeans so I went for a 6 Regular. So I am short and only 5’3” but these jeans aren’t really that long plus I want to tuck them into boots in the winter as it’s getting cold out this time of year. The fit is not too loose maybe kinda baggy which I like. A size 4 probably would have been okay but definitely not practical for Thanksgiving dinner and sitting for long car rides to visit family for the Holidays.This time I am definitely all about comfort and even though these are “Mom jeans” they actually look pretty good on my 54 year old bod! Husband approves so I’m happy with them!

A little stretch. A little snug but fits great. Love the way it fits. I have wider hips and a smaller waist. I’m 5’5 and they are the right length. They have a bit of a stretch so I could have gotten a size up but I managed to squeeze into these fine.

Different than the pictures and video, but the zipper is an interesting touch I was a little disappointed in this shirt/dress. I carefully looked at all the details and watched the video to see what to expect and it arrived different than the listing. For one, the inside is unlined and not black like the video. Second, the zipper is silver and not black. I don’t wear silver, I wear golds so it’s a not my first choice. Also the fabric doesn’t drape like the video- it’s a stretchy polyester so it hangs and does not billow open when I walk. I had a hard time getting it to open at all to show my leggings underneath. It’s also big- I’m 5’3” and 125 lbs. The waist is way too big for me and does not form to any of my curves. Fortunately, it’s at a good price and is unique with the zipper opening. I’ll have to try to sew it to make it fit my frame.

Warm and Comfortable is an understatement! BUY THEM! Holy Moly, I feel like I hit the jackpot with these boots. We are heading to Heinz Field in Pittsburgh in the middle of December. I really wanted some comfy (walking all day) warm boots that would be an all day thing. These are absolutely perfect and so cute at the same time. I could not be more thrilled with my purchase! I have wore them all day today in the snow, cold, and on hard ground and they pass the comfy warm test with flying colors. I wear a 7 1/2 and bought an 8 and they are perfect👍 12/21/19 Update on my review: I still love my boots! I got so many compliments on them. We spent the weekend in Pittsburgh and went to a Steelers game. (Outdoor Stadium) I was in my boots from 10 a.m. until 4:30 a.m. when we got home and they were amazing, comfy, warm boots. We walked all over the city and never had discomfort at all. My girlfriend had her expensive Sperry boots on which she had issues with. I'm so happy with this purchase, buy them...you will not regret it!!!

True To Size Wow so let me start by saying if your like me and have bad luck buying jeans online and your thinking about getting these, just do it... I was definitely skeptical, especially with them being a lil pricey, but when I got them today and tried them on, I was amazed beyond belief... They fit like a glove. Im usually 140-150 LBS, but I've put on 30 extra pounds, so it's harder for me to find jeans that fit and don't look weird on me, because I have a really really big booty, and thighs for days... I'm 5Ft, 6in and the length on these jeans are perfect... There not to long where u r stepping on them, and there not to short, not even close... I couldn't be more happier with these jeans... I love them and there so super comfy... So if your thinking about getting them, don't drive yourself crazy, just get em... You'll be happy u did like me.

Soft, and comfy, and very loose in the legs Hello! I'm 5'5, 177lbs today (changes daily bc of perimenopause, lol) and apple shaped. I usually wear 22/24 (2x to 3x. The suggested size was 3x. I bought a 4x so I would have more room in the legs to breathe. As you can tell by my pics, the pants are very loose and don't look like they do in the picture advertised. Had they been more honest, I would have sized down 1 or even 2 sizes. They are also longer than I was hoping. They were out of white petite, so I had to order a regular, so in all fairness, this was my doing for wanting a decent pair of white pants now. Let me say that the material is super soft and light weight & super comfy. I am going to order another pair, and this time in the correct size. I definitely recommend!

Tighter Than Expected, Overall Nice Fit and Fabric I'm 5'4" and 38"x33"x39". According to the size chart the Size 12 would fit best at my waist, but would have been baggy at the hips. I decided to purchase a 10 and a 12 to make sure of the fit. The 12 was obviously tight looking while still in the package, so I tried them on first—never even opened the size 10. The 12 fit very tight across the hips and thighs, but are not tight around my waist. Waistband rolls when I sit, but I don't tuck my shirts in as I did for the photo. Thick fabric for a stretch denim. Regular inseam length hits right above the back of my foot. Front pockets are very shallow, 2" deep. Followup note: These pants are difficult to pull all the way up. I have to grab the waistband and hold it while I bend over to pull them upward up to 3 times. Once up they stay pretty well, but I wish the waistband was a little tighter. Basically, every slim-cut stretchy denim pant I have tried has this same tight hips and loose waist fit problem.

**TRUE PETITE SIZING** Okay sooo……. I am super pleased with these scrubs. I am a new grad RN, I am 5’0” tall, and 95 pounds. I wear a 00 in jeans. I have been on the hunt for some TRUE petite sized scrubs. So far I have tried white cross, barco, Adar, and these HeartSoul. None of the others have even come close in comparison to how good these scrubs fit me! I got the XXS petite in the pants and the XXS in the top. I do have a little booty for my size, and these pants actually kind of show it off 🤣 which I never can say in scrubs because in all other brands i get the absolute smallest size and they’re still baggy on me. I may could have gotten just an XS petite in these pants and they would still have fit me good. Very pleased with the true petite fit. I haven’t wore them for a shift yet so I’ll update later on their durability, but so far the quality seems good.

Super soft and comfy! I love these jeans so much! I barely lost 80 lbs and thought I had to get a size 8 but I bought these size 6 short and they fit me perfectly. It was a little difficult to pull up since there aren’t any belt loops but it’s okay since I was still able to get them up all the way. I like how these seem to have a bit of tummy control without feeling like it’s pressing down too hard on me at all. These are really comfortable and end right at my ankle or at least the top portion of my ankle. I think these have some stretch in them so they don’t feel stiff like normally thicker jeans while still giving you a lot of flexibility. But because of this they may not feel very warm even while indoors. They are indeed skinny jeans and Make me feel nice and slim. I’m 5’2+3/4” and between 135-138 lbs.

Very comfortable, fit great! At 5'5",183 lbs I am currently in a size 14 and these definitely fit true to size. I have more of a straight up and down figure, but they were not cutting in on my tummy. I do have it tiny bit of a muffin top, but not so much that I felt like I needed to go a size up. These pants are super comfortable. They are thick like jeans, but stretchy like leggings. I intentionally showed them with one boot in and one out so you can see that even though I would consider them a skinny jean cut, the pant leg has enough room to wear over the top of my ankle boots. They are also cut small enough, they could be worn tucked inside boots. If you wanted to wear them with taller boots, they would be nice and comfy because they would not be bulky. Overall, I gave these mid-rise jeans five stars because they are not only comfortable, but they fit nicely and are versatile. You can dress them up or dress them down according to your own style. You should definitely give them a try!

Waist was way too big for a 0. Cute jeggings and affordable I'm 5'1" 106 pounds and went with the 0 short. For the most part these fit perfectly except for the waist. They ran really big in the waist for a size 0. The legs and hips were very tight but the waist had a huge gap. I would've deducted 2 stars but since these were so affordable I decided to only deduct 1 because for the price i can deal with the waist area. I just won't be able to wear cropped tops with these. Looks exactly as advertised and love them.

Great Jeggings For An Excellent Price! These Amazon Essential Jegging’s are absolutely AMAZING!! I saw these on YouTube, by an Influencer, and can’t remember for the life of me who it was -but I’m surely glad that I purchased them because they fit amazingly! (For reference, I am 5’2” and weigh approximately 128lbs & I ordered the size 6 Short.) They have two back usable pockets & two fake front pockets. They offer several different color options including: white, black, dark wash, coral pink, sage green, camel, and medium wash, and light wash. They offer the jeggings in a regular, short, and long length. I like how lightweight and soft they feel. I have gotten several compliments while wearing them and have referred several people to the Amazon link for these jeggings. My 81 year old Stepmother recently purchased a pair after seeing me wearing my new jeggings and learning that the price was less than $14!! Really great value for the money & I highly recommend them to anyone looking for a decent jean on a budget. I will definitely be ordering a few more pairs, in different colors, very soon!

Comfortable and soft Few things that’s little off for me first . The sizing .. I would say size down . I’ve been ordering xxl lately but xl would be better . Xxl is too lose feeling . The length . I’m 5’5 and ordered 29” Inseam .., they feel too short . You can see in the video and photo . Lastly , it does show your cellulite , you can also notice it in my video when I turn my back . Aldo they don’t really hold you in much , if you know what I mean. My mom pouch . But the pants are very stretchy , soft and comfortable. The material does attract fuzz a little . Im glad I ordered the black color because I think the lighter colors would not work great on my bigger body ( and lighter colors show more cellulite )

Perfect for 5’1” and under!! I have a 27” inseam so it’s impossible to find pants I don’t have to hem. I bought a small short and absolutely love them. Super soft, fit perfectly around my waist as a 5ft 127 pound person. $40 is a bit hefty but at least they feel like a good quality and definitely worth it for the short girls who can never find pants. I put them on and immediately wanted to buy more in other colors - the ones in the pic are the coffee color

Love!! I was skeptical about purchasing these bc I'm 5'4 165 and curvy so most of the time things don't fit properly they're either too tight on thighs and butt or too loose. I bought a large and i was shocked they fit and they are soooooo silky smooth. Love them and can't wait to buy more

Runs way too large and no communication from company As embarrassing the photos are of these scrubs on me I am posting to show how large they run as I wish someone had shown or told me :) I made an order of several pair of scrub bottoms (including these red ones) in different colours and styles trying to find the right fit. The colour is a vibrant red and after washing in hot water and drying the colour remains but the size did not change. I ordered a XXS Petite and the pictures are taken 1, as they arrived in a plastic bag 2, the side view with nothing in my pockets but the back looks like it is full :( 3, the extra length and 4 I tied them as tight as possible and am showing that they still have several inches where they slide up and down. I had no communication with the company despite several attempts on this pair, a green pair that arrived without any tags and no bag and note the white pair is EXTREMELY see through! Since I needed something to wear immediately I'm keeping these and taking the loss. I give an average 3 star review because the colour is good and they will fit many people...plus I hate leaving negative reviews even when the company ignores my questions about refunds, returns or exchanges. For reference I am about 5'1", 102lbs and waist is abt 24"and again I ordered the XXS Petite, washed in hot water and machine dried and they are still embarrassingly large.

Could be worse, but could be A LOT better! Just starting nursing I'm finding it so hard to find nice but affordable cute scrubs. Not only that but looking for ones that fit me right is even more of a struggle. These pants however are not the greatest I do like the fit on me though. The fabric is not stretchy it's stiff and not soft and the elastic waist comes up past my belly button. There is also a lot of extra fabric in the hip area that's not needed for me. With that said a small fits me relatively nicely I like my scrubs to fit me more on the snugger side with a little bit of looseness but definitely not baggy everywhere. I don't have to hem the bottom the length hits a little below my ankle hovering above the ground. My measurements are hip: 40, waist: 30, wt: 152 ht: 5'4. I hope this helps some else see if these work for them. UPDATE: I wore them to work once and they were the most uncomfortable scrubs pants I own. I tried to make it work but they were not staying up, kept falling down at the waist. They were super tight in my thighs it felt like it was almost gonna rip when I sat down. I ended up returning them 😑 disappointed....

Long, long, long,but ok I'm 5'5", 140ish lbs, and the small petite fit as expected: fitted, but not skintight... but they were SOOOOO LONG. They still are just barely off the ground with a petite. The material on these is a thick-threaded, stiff fabric, it almost reminds me of the fabric tents are made of, or work coveralls (but thinner), or low thread count sheets... For the fabric being so stiff, i was super surprised with how comfortable these scrubs actually were. Not like your fave pair of pjs or anything, but not bad at all. I ordered both the pants and top on Amazon, and they match perfectly in style, material, and color. (I've included both tags in picture so you can compare item #s). For a $30 set of scrubs, these aren't bad... but they're not as amazing as some of the reviews state. I guess i was expecting more.

Definitely recommend!

The (short) length is lovely! I’ve been going back and forth with these. They are comfortable. The lining inside is soft and cozy and the leggings are stretchy and the waistband has give that make them lovely for relaxing or just hanging out. I had no problem with sheerness (at least in the lighting I checked in lol). I ordered the short size, because I’m 5’1 and short and the length was great. It’s super hard for me to find comfy and/or activewear bottoms that are the correct length so this was a treat. This may sound nitpicky, but I just really wish they had pockets. I almost always purchase leggings with leg pockets and these don’t have them. The inclusion of a side pocket would make them a five-star for sure. The other reason for deduction is my concern about how they’ll hold up over time. I have machine washed/dried them a couple times and they held up fine, but the material just seems moderate and not great so I think they may end up piling fairly early on. I’ll update over time on how they hold up, but that’s my main quarrel. For the price the material is fair, but I’m taking into consideration since there are other options in a similar price point with less piling-inducing fabric. Otherwise though, I do like these and can’t emphasize enough how amazing it is to find pants like these with the right length!

Cozy, comfortable and good quality I am very happy with these pants. The 29” inseam length hits the top of my feet on my 5’4” frame. The waistband has just enough stretch and the fleece lining makes them extremely comfortable to wear. The outside has a nice sheen to it that drapes well and the overall silhouette is flattering. The only pocket in these pants are on the center back but it spans 2/3 of the way across the waistband and is deep enough to fit my phone. I’m glad to have this as the cooler weather is coming and I think these will be very cozy.

Soft, Warm, and Great Fit for Tall Sizes These fleece-lined yoga pants are some of the softest and most comfortable I’ve owned. The fleece lining makes them cozy without being too heavy, and they’re perfect for colder weather. I really appreciate the option to choose inseam length—at 5’9” with more room in the thigh and booty area, the XL 33” Tall fit me perfectly. They have a nice high rise that stays in place and a wide waistband that smooths without digging in. The back pocket is bigger than most yoga pants and can easily hold my phone and keys, which is super convenient. The straight-leg cut also makes them versatile enough for lounging, errands, or even casual wear outside the house. If I had to point out one thing, it’s that they’re definitely warm, so they might feel too heavy for warmer days—but for fall and winter, they’re perfect.

Overall super happy with them.

Just buy them girl! Hey you! Pregnant lady trying to feel cute, buy the black jeans! They are so comfy, stretchy, flattering, I wish I bought them earlier I literally wear them almost everyday 😅 they go with so many outfits, and they make my bump look very cute and smooth with tighter shirts. I’m 5’7 usually 150lbs + the now 12lbs I’ve gained now that I’m 20 weeks. I didn’t want to buy a lot of pants so I'm heavily dependent on finding good quality maternity clothes. These are worth the investment!

Short. Weird sizing. I’m 5’8” and 6 months pregnant. I got the black wash. I have other size 4/6 maternity jeans from old navy that fit great but they’re skinny style. These 4/6 (small) size are really short and tight up the crack. They’re also tight right along where my baby sits low. I first ordered medium (size 8/10) but they were really baggy in the butt and would slip down with only my phone in the back pocket. They also had a discolored spot. Even the medium wasn’t as long as I would like. Also weird that it’s $7 cheaper for the size small. Pre pregnancy I wore a 4/6. These were just disappointing bc it’s been hard to find an overall great fit and style for a reasonable price. They’re soft though. (pic in camo is of size small.)

Comfy but inseam is short Why did you pick this product vs others?: I wanted full panel "over the belly" jeans because the other pair I have no longer fits me properly. So far these have been fine, my only problem is they aren't quite long enough. I am 5'8" and normally wear a size 4 when not pregnant and the medium fits well but the inseam is a couple inches too short! It isnt too noticeable while standing, but while sitting it is obvious and it looks terrible. Maybe an option to select a different length as well as overall size would be nice. Other than that, these are comfortable and look fine. A little boxy due to the "straight leg" with no taper and no flare, but I'm ok with that. I have not had any problems with these slipping down, the panel rolling down, or anything. It all stays in place which is perfect for me! Just keep in mind the inseam length if you have longer legs!

Must have maternity jeans Best maternity jeans and super flattering. I’m just over 5 feet tall and weigh 125 pounds and I ordered the black in a size small. They are a bit long, but I rolled them once and they are fine with sneakers. They are a perfect length on me with 2-3 inch heel boots. They are so comfortable, I haven’t put on a pair of jeans since I found out I was pregnant because it’s so uncomfortable but these I could wear all day. I immediately ordered them in a different wash.

Regret not buying sooner honestly I’m 5’4 and currently weighing 140 lbs. I was originally a size 0 in jeans pre pregnancy so I haven’t been able to comfortably wear jeans in months. I honestly regret not buying these sooner. They are SO COMFY and I love the straight leg jean. They belly bad is SO soft it feels like you’re wearing leggings and the stretchiness of the actual jean material is perfect it feels like a begging. Honestly could not be happier with this purchase. I put off buying maternity jeans for so long bc of the cost bc the comfort and confidence in not having the rubber band holding my pants together is a million times worth it.

Had a hole in the fabric… I had to edit this because I ordered a second pair in a different color and this one came with a small tear in the fabric on the upper right leg. These were supposed to be brand new so I don’t know how it came with a hole in them. Returning this pair even though I loved the first ones I got. The company should note all the reviews and complaints about defects, I just noticed after reading many reviews that this is a recurring problem for them. Can’t believe how great these fit me, I always struggle to find a pair online that look and feel like real jeans and not jeggings. I got the size 15 in ‘Long’ length because I’m 5’11 and want to wear them with heels. In the picture shared I have 3” heels on. Even without heels I roll them up slightly but they still look good. I’ve gotten more compliments in these jeans than anything else I’ve bought recently- highly recommend!

Love these jeans I really love the way these fit. I’m 5 foot 8 and 173 pounds. Since these are juniors I bought the 14 plus. Unfortunately, the stitching on the pockets is very frayed after 1 wear and 1 wash. However, I have a few pairs of these jeans in different colors and I do love them. Also, in some colors I need long and other colors I need regular. It seems the darker the favric the longer they are. They’re very comfortable and hold shape pretty well through the day.

Small reg vs small petite (both fit great) Very good product. I like the material and the waist band elastic is comfortable, and doesn't extend fully in the front so it doesn't get bunched up when pulling the ties. Based on reviews, I ended up getting the small and small petite to try. I am 5'3.75" and 130lbs, usually wear a size 5 juniors or 4/6 depending on the pants as I have a booty. I was concerned as based on the measurements I didn't think my booty would fit in the small (39" hips) but they did, easily! Plenty of room in both sizes. I had room behind the thighs as well, and only had to pull the drawstrings slightly, which is surprising for me with pants in general. I laid out the small reg and small petite and tried on both. The only discernable difference I found is in the length of the pant leg. Small reg measured at 31" inseam, and it was 2" longer than the petite. For me both fit well, and just depended on what "look" I would want- fully over the top of the tennis shoe with wrinkles (reg) or just laying on top (petite). For reference the one pictured is the petite and the shoes are standard asics sneakers (about 1" heel).

Perfect for skinny/ curve-less girls! FINALLY!! Scrub pants that fit me so PERFECTLY! For reference, I’m 100 lbs, 5’2”, short torso/ high waist - I wear XXS regular length. I have a very thin frame with NO curves/ thighs (sigh), so it’s tough finding scrubs that don’t look insanely baggy on me. I’ve even tried pants that have a little stretch in them and are even categorized as “slim fit,” but those only enhanced my LACK of curves (doh!). I know I might be speaking to a small percentage of the population, but I hope this review helps my fellow skinny-minnie, not-so-blessed-in-that-department gals. These pants are form-fitting and truly slim fit. My colleague pointed out to me that my pants look very nicely fitted on me. Yet it still has enough room to move around in, and it doesn’t hug my behind so tight to where it accentuates my flat behind. It’s so very comfortable around the waist, and the pockets were nicely designed as they are subtle, and they don’t make your pants look bulky or like there’s just too much going on (I prefer simple designs, but with functionality). The slits sit perfectly on top of my shoes. I don’t have a side view, but I do have this view from the top. These are truly the only scrub pants I will wear!

Great fit and SO comfy!! However... had to size down. I’ve always heard great things about Grey’s scrubs, so I figured I’d give them a shot. With that being said, I am beyond glad I did! These scrubs are SO SOFT. I love the side pocket with the zipper and the slits at the bottom of the pants. When I ordered these the first time, I ordered a Small Tall. The length fit perfect but they were baggier than my liking, so I did have to send them back for an XS Tall. For reference, I’m 5’6 and around 135 lbs. They fit my waist and legs great. The length could be just slightly longer for my liking (I have long legs and a short torso, so my pants sit up higher on my waist— and I also have slim legs so finding pants that fit my body type can be hard) but overall I’m very happy with my purchase and would recommend these pants! I’ll probably end up buying another pair.

I love the fit and material of these scrub pants. I am 5'4" and weigh 130lbs. The size small fits great and is the perfect length. I have tried a lot of different scrub brands and Grays Anatomy are some of my favorite for comfort compared to price.

Best work pants I've found. These are exactly what I've been looking for. Waist fits great with a "relaxed" fit in the legs that leaves room for crouching and moving around (which i do a lot of in the hvac/pipe work field) and plenty of pockets in the right spots. Great for winter as well as you have room for a layer underneath for fleece leggings or long John's. Nice durable canvas-like material that still has a bit of stretch. Honestly these are perfect for what I do at work and still somehow have a fitted silhouette even though they are considered relaxed fit. Long story short I really like them, and ordered 3 pairs. Definitely recommend, these are probably the best women's Utility work pants I've found so far and I've tried a decent amount. I'm 5'3 and currently 135ish pounds and ordered a size 4 regular

Not a WORK PANT These are basically a painter's chino trouser. The material is a soft cotton/stretch blend, comfy but hardly seems 'durable.' I was surprised by the fit - I ordered a 2 Short, I'm 5'4", 115lbs. They were slightly loose, sitting below my true 27" waist at 31" on hips. Was looking at the new Pierce model in-store, but received a 2023 version of this.

you need these!!! so comfy and fit is AMAZING the run a size big!! i am 5’6 125 and normally wear to 2 but i need a 0 in these. the best work pants ever!!! i work for a farm that requires khaki pants but all i could find was slacks in store, so comfy, and stretchy!! my favorite pants ever…let’s just say from one blue cooler girl to another they fit all the right places

A comfortable basic with lots of versatility These pants are so soft and comfortable with plenty of stretch for my growing belly. I went up from my typical medium to a large as I have now gained over 60lbs this pregnancy, and they fit really well and the pockets aren’t stretched out. I love the taller option for my 5’9 frame! I thought they were going to look more like athleisure, but the ribbed fabric makes them look neat enough to wear to the office with a sweater. Maintenance appears easy; the fabric quality is thick and durable, so no worries about tossing these in the washing machine.

Cute decent fall boots! Exactly what I was looking for. Cheap knockoff without a dramatic heel that will last likely 2 seasons. The chunky heel is great because it adds height without the stark footbed angle that causes pain like other high-heeled boots. I ordered the burgundy and the brown and decided to keep both because they both gave such different vibes. I am 5’2” and they are still true calf boots, not over my knee thank goodness. The bed feels like memory foam, very comfy! And the toes don’t squish, they are rounded enough to mostly fit them all. The colors are pretty but I imagine will be easily scuffed. Though I can’t confirm that yet, most boots of this price range and quality are not meant to be long lasting. I usually wear my boots with some small scuffs, and get up to 3 years before they are just embarrassing or peeling. As for sizing, I am about an 8 (sometimes 7.5 but I lean towards more room), and they fit true to size for size 8 and not squished at all, especially with my wool blend socks I use in the colder months. If you wear thin socks only and are between sizes you might be able to go with the smaller size. So far, I would recommend. I’ll try to update after some constant wear in the fall/winter.

The most comfortable pants I've ever worn! These pants are just amazingly comfortable! They are light weight, breathable, and just the right amount of stretch, and they are just thick enough to hide bumps and bulges, unlike knit pants. I'm 5'3", 210 lbs, and I got an XXL. They are slightly long on me, but when I have shoes on, they are fine. I could probably have gotten away with an XL for a tighter fit, but I like the comfortable fit of the XXL. They are not overly loose and fit well. They can be casual, and also great for the office. I'm getting more colors :-)

Really cute VERY comfortable and soft, must buy! I am 7 months pregnant and am recently feeling huge and uncomfortable in everything I own. I ordered these pants fully intending not to wear them til after I have this baby and to my surprise they actually fit really nicely and I could see them still fitting great different but still great after I am no longer pregnant. They are SUPER soft and feel exactly like LLR leggings but have the nice flare at the bottom and feel like better quality than some thin LLR leggings I have had. They have a nice wide waist band which for us with mom bods is important and I suspect they will be flattering on my less round body. They do look pretty good even on my bloated pregnant body tho. The pattern I got definitely draws the eyes vertically making me look taller rather than wider. Only thing I could see being an issue for some people is I am a tall lady 5’8”-5’9” and they are long which I personally love but it is something to note if you’re significantly shorter than my height you may need to cut or hem them. Otherwise a great purchase. Full disclosure I just received them and only tried them on so if they don’t hold up after a few wears I will update. Update: I wore these all the way through the end of my pregnancy and my baby is now three months old I still wear them all the time, I bought 2 other colors as well. I basically live in these pants. They are as I thought they’d be, flattering while still being comfortable. They have held up super well, still soft and not faded or ripping, after heavy use and washes on many sanitize cycle washes.

High Quality, ALL USE Pants This yoga/scrub pants by KECOLS are high quality, fit very well and are true to size. The fabric is soft to the touch, and thicker than normal yoga pants and is a 4-way-stretch which gives a lot of freedom of movements. They have plenty of pockets and even with a dedicated phone pocket there is no pulling down typical with thinner fabrics in cargo pants, where with the weight of the pocket is very uncomfortable to walk because of bouncing and weight. Not in this case. However for me the bad part was that the pants are 1 inch too long in the inseam as seen in the photos. I am 5'3" and 130 lb for reference.I eventually had to alter the leg by eliminating the slit on the sides which I really liked, hem and run an elastic in the ankles as seen in photo. The result was a customized look which I love anyway but definitely changed the style of the pants. Washability of this garment was easy and practical . I washed them with same color in hot water and dry them at high heat. No damage, no wrinkles, no color fading all around a very well made pant that I hope will last me for a while.

Comfy yoga scrubs These yoga scrub pants are super comfortable and have tons of pockets for all of your nursing needs. They're stretchy and easy to move around in. There is a zippered cargo pocket to make sure all of your items are secure. The one pocket has a badge loop on it. My only complaints about these pants would be that there are no back pockets, which is a feature I typically like on my scrub pants. And second is I got this in the ceil color, depending on if your facility requires a certain color, the ceil color that these came in is a bit of a richer of a blue than was standard at hospitals I was required to wear ceil blue at. I don't think it's hospital approved ceil blue. On the plus side, these are comfy enough to Casually wear around the house, or even if you wanted to wear them as like gym pants they are stretchy enough and comfortable enough to do. The fabric is thick and stretchy. With scrubs, I typically get a small in bottoms, as I like a more fitted look, and the smalls fit well for me. I am 5'4, and the length on these pants is perfect

Super comfy! These pants a super soft and comfy! They have so many pockets; 2 normal pockets and then 2 more, one on each leg. The waist hits right at the belly button and is adjustable with drawstrings. The fabric is stretchy and seems like a really nice quality. I am 5’11” with a 36” inseam and weigh 150lbs. I got the size large tall. The only reason I didn’t give 5 stars is because the tall size is still too short on me. It may just be my preference but I like my pants to touch the ground when barefoot and these do not. Most people will not have this issue but just a heads up for the tall girls. Anyway, there are great pants and I would definitely recommend.

Super Comfortable and Stylish Pants! I love these pants! The Medium Tall fits me perfectly since I’m 5'8". The fabric is soft, stretchy, and so comfortable. Thank you for including the talls! I'm 5'10", with a lot of that length in my legs, so finding long enough pants is a forever challenge. I'm very happy with the length of this pair. The pants themselves are comfortable and fit true to size. I appreciate the inclusion of the drawstring as well. They wash great, I always let my pants air dry to avoid shrinkage/losing any length. Theres's plenty of storage/deep pockets, even a pen pocket! The only thing I'd change is the brand name on the cargo pocket, I'd prefer them without it, but that's a small detail I can't hold against them!

Big rips on the mom jeans These look so cute on the model and honestly, I like them for my body shape too. I am 5-2, 120 pounds with a short torso. I usually wear hip huggers below my stomach but I wanted to try something different. Price was good. I got the medium and found it fit really well in the legs, but tight at the top. It really gave the mom jeans look at the top with the bigger zipper. I did find the material was a nice stretch and overall good quality. I took a star off because the rips in the fabric seemed much larger in person than the picture. Like too much ripping for it to be worn anywhere nicer.

Wear These Anywhere It's nice to have something to wear out that isn't work clothes. These G4Free Wide Leg Pants are just the ticket for me. Just under 5'5" and thick waisted, I was concerned whether or not I could find the right fit. I got the Lg and the measurements are spot on. The fit feels great and the length works perfectly. The stitching is pretty good, but these will probably be hand washed or in a wash bag to keep them nice. I don't really like the zippers. They zip up/down just fine, but they don't hinge well. In other words, you need to push them down so they don't stick up. Kind of weird, but they work. The pockets are roomy and lay nicely. You can't really see them unless you have your hand in one. Quite comfy. They have a sewn pleat down the front that doesn't stand out, just makes the pants look nicer. That also gives you a slimmer look, imo. Nice smooth feel. The waist size was smaller than I wanted, but actually fits great and they feel like they were made for me. I like them alot.

Sleek and comfy and great choice of inseam lengths These pants are fabulous for either lounging at home or at work.. The material is 81% polyester and 19% spandex, so there’s plenty of stretch and this material needs no special laundering, comes out of the dryer wrinkle free. What makes these pants look a little dressier to me is that sharp front seam. Very classy looking! The waist clings much like a pair of leggings. I think this is actually designed to be that way to lend shape to your silhouette. I don’t find the waist overly tight or uncomfortable. I like the zippered side pockets for an athleisure flare.The big attraction for me was the choice of a 29 inch inseam because I am petite and have spent my life shortening pants! I ordered a size small with the 29 inch seam and I am 5 feet tall, 117 pounds. These fit perfectly and just drape over the top of my shoe. I will enjoy this alternative style compared to jeans, joggers, or leggings on occasion. Great quality and I highly recommend!

Very cute and trendy denim capris; true to size and great weight I've recently lost 45 pounds and have realized most of my staple wardrobe items are way too big. It's not capris weather, but I wanted to get ahead of the season and make sure I'm ready for the warmer days ahead. I don't really like wearing shorts, but capris are a go-to pant for me.I am still trying to figure out what size I should be wearing, and based on the measurements provided in the description I picked a size 12. A SIZE TWELVE!!! I am still having a hard time believing it. The dark blue wash is perfect for me. The capris are very well made; the fabric is sturdy but still lightweight. Soft and stretchy. The distressing and frayed hem are on trend. I like that there are functional front and back pockets, a must for me.For reference, I'm 5'11" and weigh about 180. I have a very straight figure and have a hard time with pants fit, but these fit well enough without any areas where they are too tight or loose. These will definitely be a staple item for me in the months ahead. The price point is a little higher than I like to pay for casual pants, but these should last for a long time. Definitely recommend these and I'm considering getting in another wash.

Too tight, too long for golf pants. I usually order the size Amazon recommends because it usually fits. In this case it did and it didn’t. The fabric in these pants is stretchy and I think if I had ordered the next size up they would have been loose in the waist, especially as I wore them through they day. But, the legs were very tight, long and ended up being super scrunched. I need golf pants as I only have warm weather golf clothes but these definitely will not work. If the pants were made a bit wider and not as long they would work. As they are now, they don’t for me. I will be returning them. I am 5’3, 113 and ordered XS in Gray. The color is good and pockets and material seem fine, other than tightness in way they are designed.

Well made, very high heel, smaller calf, possible pinch point I’ve obtained several pairs of boots for the winter. These run smaller than others, and are smaller through the calf as well. They do still fit but may cause issues if worn for long periods. I also noticed that the edge of the top of the boot comes rich at the bend in my knee. I noticed that as soon as I sat down with them on. I would prefer not having that hit at that spot and worry that it will rub or pinch. I’m not sure but that may just be an issue for someone at my same height (5’2’) or shorter. They look very nice and have the look that many like with the larger than usual soles and the sole pattern. These are very high. They feel good - soft and smooth with nice lining. I’m not sure I would pay this much for another pair considering the smaller calf and height at the knee bend.

Super cute sexy and so very flattering. My 2nd pair. 30 inch inseam was just right. I'm 5'1" 114 pounds and went with my normal size of small which was true to size and a perfect fit. This is actually my 2nd time purchasing these pants. The first time I went with a 28 inch inseam and they were the right length but due to the tight fit it caused the legs to raise just a little and it wasn't exactly where I wanted them to be. This time I went with the 30 inch inseam and they were absolutely perfect. These are made of a good quality stretchy soft comfortable polyester material. They are tight fitted but have plenty of stretch. The buttocks has a scrunched fitted design to help shape and make your butt more flattering and sexy which it definitely does. I've had several women ask me where I bought these. I use these for work so I do wish they had front pockets. That's the only downside to these pants. They do have two back pockets which can be buttoned up to keep your items, especially cash or your debit card, from falling out. My phone is too big to button up but the pocket still holds my phone. I use the other back pocket for my keys and vape. This is where the front pocket would come in handy because I also have to carry an ink pen with me and when I wear these I have to clip my pen to the neck of my shirt which constantly pokes me in the face and my makeup gets all over it from rubbing my neck. If these had even a simple small front pocket I could use it for my ink pen. Aside from that these are absolutely perfect and I love them even more now that I have a longer length. They are super flattering to the legs thighs and butt and very sexy. Highly recommend. I do wish these were a little cheaper though. It gets expensive trying to buy enough for the work week at $30 a pair.

Bootyliciously awesome!! Must have! Love love love these pants!!! I bought 2 pair, blue and red. I’m 5’3”, 154lbs and Large fit very comfortably! I wore the blue ones out dancing and they are soft and made my butt look soooo good! I received so many compliments!!! I was drenched in sweat from dancing all night but the pants didn’t make me overly hot at all. I was worried about under buttcheek sweat leaving a line lol but it was all good. No embarrassing sweat marks through the pants. I got the 31.5” inseam which seemed to be a little long on me and I was wearing 2 1/2” heels. I did wash them before wearing. Cold water wash and tumble dry 30min and low heat 30min with dry clothes already in the dryer to help speed it up. No shrinkage or issues after washing and wearing. Beautiful bright blue and didn’t fade or bleed at all. I haven’t worn the red ones yet so I’m going to be returning them to exchange them for a 30” inseam pair. I think they’ll be the perfect length. These are an absolute MUST HAVE. I’ve sent the link to all my friends. They are reasonably priced and I personally think they’ll are worth it!

Good for the price I got this pair first, and then also the white one. First you see what they look like with straight bottom. They become longer after being ironed, out of the package. I'm 5'10", so it is an acceptable length. However, It's still a little short for me, when I walk and move around and I found them not very flattering. I had this idea. Purchased a pair of shoelaces in similar color; cut a small hole on the 'wrong' side of the bottom of each pant leg so that it is between the very bottom and the horizontal seam, and then I threaded a shoelace in each, to tie them around the ankle. And these pants become what you see on the last picture, with a tie on the outer side of the leg. This style is more attractive to me, and works better with this garment for my height. I did the same with the white pair. And I wear both frequently. I haven't had a chance to wash them yet, since I wear them gently and mostly for walks. I heard from other reviews that these pants shrink and pill. Shrinkage is the bigger worry. I have other linen pants that shrink and stretch with washes and wear. My plan with THESE pants is to iron them while wet after the wash, and stretch them out, then hang-dry. In my experience, this works with clothes that are prone to shrinking. At least for a while. For pilling/fuzz, I keep a fabric-shaving machine. It's been a great help for many years, and there's a great selection of them right here on Amazon. Hope this helps.

Very cute & nice length I am 5'5" tall and weigh 145 pounds. I ordered a size Medium and they fit perfectly. I have tried linen type pants in the past and never could find a pair with a flattering cut/fit but these are very flattering on me. I have a 32" inseam and so the length on these is perfect for me. They could always be shortened for someone with a shorter inseam. I would rather have pants be too long that can be shortened versus too short as they cannot be made longer. I don't think I will risk putting them in the dryer as I would not want them to shrink at all. I am overall very pleased with these and will most likely order them in another color.Update 3/12/23: I liked these so much that I ordered them in another color. Unfortunately the green pair I just received did not fit the same as the first pair and were not even the correct brand. The first pair were the Cali1850 as listed in the description but the second pair were April Kiss. I am returning the second pair as they are too tight and cut completely different than the original pair.

Just PERFECT! Listen!! Ruuun don’t walk 😫 these are such great jeans. Slight stretch fits great round the tummy! I’m 5’2 it just hits the floor looks great in flats or heels easy to dress up for an elevated look!!!! Color literally perfect!!! Bought a size M

They look like real jeans! I had surgery about 5 weeks ago and can't wear real jeans for a few months to protect my incisions. I was getting really sick of wearing nothing but joggers and pj pants so I decided to try these. I got the size small in the long/33inch inseam because the regular length felt a little short/flood-y on me. These are PLENTY long on me! In my pictures I'm wearing boots with a 3.5 inch heel and I'm 5'6 and they are perfect length with the heel. The waistband offers a little compression type support which was actually perfect for my post surgery recovery. It felt really nice to be able to have a cute outfit to wear to an early Thanksgiving dinner yesterday and feel put together for the first time in weeks! The waistband didn't roll at all, and these didn't bunch or sag or become loose during the day. The fabric is stretchy and soft and they held their shape perfectly and I'd definitely recommend to anyone healing from an abdominal surgery or for people who just don't like wearing jeans. If you're a leggings girl-you'll love these. The "claw marks" in the description is just the worn look "whiskering" at the hip area. These have a cross over yoga-pant style waistband. I prefer real jeans, but these are definitely great for me for the time being!These have real pockets too!They did have a slight funky smell right out of the package but not nearly as bad as another brand I tried! And the smell goes away if you wash with oxyclean + detergent.

They look like real jeans! I had surgery about 5 weeks ago and can't wear real jeans for a few months to protect my incisions. I was getting really sick of wearing nothing but joggers and pj pants so I decided to try these. I got the size small in the long/33inch inseam because the regular length felt a little short/flood-y on me. These are PLENTY long on me! In my pictures I'm wearing boots with a 3.5 inch heel and I'm 5'6 and they are perfect length with the heel. The waistband offers a little compression type support which was actually perfect for my post surgery recovery. It felt really nice to be able to have a cute outfit to wear to an early Thanksgiving dinner yesterday and feel put together for the first time in weeks! The waistband didn't roll at all, and these didn't bunch or sag or become loose during the day. The fabric is stretchy and soft and they held their shape perfectly and I'd definitely recommend to anyone healing from an abdominal surgery or for people who just don't like wearing jeans. SHEIN linen pants Material is thin, quality of the stitch is poor quality thread is coming out of every seam, the zipper is very cheap and the button is also very cheap. The length is very long for me (5ft4in) the cut is actually nice. I will be returning these. I bought a similar pair for cheaper off SHEIN and they ripped after 2 washes on delicate and laying flat to dry, which I can foresee these doing the same thing unfortunately. The SHEIN ones were as see through as these either. Also in the picture you can see a mark. It’s not a mark that’s just a different color of thread embedded in the fabric which is had a couple of those throughout.

Nice Quality. Sizing Not Quite Right. These are decently made boots and come nicely packaged to prevent deformation. I am a size 9 in most boots/shoes, but There was a little too much room in the foot for my liking. I could have gone down a half size. I can probably put on thick hiking socks to keep my feet from moving around too much though. Aside from the foot being slightly oversized, I felt they were also slightly too tall for my legs - I am 5’6” and have longer legs/shorter torso. Average height of an American woman is 5’4” according to the Googles. These hit weird when I bent my knee to walk, right in my tendons. The shaft was slightly too tall. The portion above the ankle, before the calf starts getting thicker was also too roomy, which led to some slouching issues. These are nice boots, but they just didn’t fit quite right for me. But not so poorly that I won’t still wear them and ferl pretty cute doing it..

Comfy & cute high knee boot Perfect high knee boot! Wider calf friendly, no break in period needed, comfortable from the get go and very easy to walk in. If you are in between sizes I would size down. Sometimes I am a 7, and sometimes a 7.5. I got a 7.5 and they fit fine with a thicker sock, totally wearable-- but definitely could have gone with a 7 for a better fit. I am 5' 4" for reference where the boots hit me on the legs.

Fits awkward body type! I have diabetes, and am insulin resistant. Because of this, my stomach bulges like a pregnant lady. It’s hard to find pants that fit right because they are always too tight in the waist and loose on the legs. If I get them to fit my waist right, the legs will be very loose and look so bad and frumpy. I am 5’7 and 175lbs, much of it carried in my stomach area. I chose 12Long but may have been able to size down 1 size, but they would be very snug. If you are my size and body type, I’d say stick with 12L, but if you prefer tight pants go down 1. If you have a big booty, go up 1. These pants fit my stomach AND legs properly. I have longer legs and the length covered my ankles very well and did not rise throughout the day like high waters, even with me bending and stooping down a lot at work. They were very soft and comfortable while still holding me in and giving me a nice shape overall. Made me look like a woman instead of an Oompa Loompa. I have only worn them once, but I have a cat and chinchilla so my black clothes always hold hair, but the hair did not stick to these. 5 stars! Will buy again! FYI: The back pockets are not real pockets.

Misleading size chart - way too short I am leaving this review for the taller girls among us. It is already a challenge to find long enough pants on Amazon for those of us who are above 5'7". Perfect in every way I have such a hard time finding a 38” inseam so when I saw these I had to jump on them and I’m so glad I did. I absolutely love everything about these! They are true to size, so comfortable and so cute. Also can’t beat the price! I will definitely be ordering more of these.

GREAT fit for my long legs! I am 5’9 and 135lbs with very long legs. These are size 5 with 34” inseam and I could ask for a better fit. They are not super high rise so they are more flattering for my longer legs/shorter torso. They have enough stretch where they hug my thighs/booty without a gap at the waist and they JUST touch the floor which is perfect. My one and only complaint is the placement of the back pockets, too wide. They give a wider/flatter appearance. But most jeans in this price range have that problem. Overall very pleased!

Nice fit and comfortable ! My wife has another pair of wrangler jeans so she didn’t need to guess in her size (but order your normal size as these do fit true to size). She has a harder time finding pants that fit her. She’s 5’7” and 110 so she has a small waist and long legs. She bought the 25 (0x34) and they fit great. She says they’re comfortable and has a sort of elastic band around the waist the stretches a bit and can’t wait to try them when riding our horse.

different colors are different fabric weight I am 5 feet tall, 29 inches at the belly button, and 37 inches at the widest part of my hips. Length as expected; I always have to hem my jeans. Ordered size 5/32. Two-inch waistband gap in the back, but I think if I order a 3/32, they’ll be too small in the hips. I ordered the Rebecca, and was really disappointed with the color. It’s lighter than shown. The fabric is also surprisingly light weight. Fine for fashion, but won’t stand up to work and riding very long. Also ordered the Maggie. Fabric was much stiffer. Seems like it’ll last for riding. Whisking at the knees is not as light as shown. Not as comfortable right away. Do I order a third color and play Goldilocks?

These are bootcut so I'm hoping I can get them in another style as well, like slim fit or slim straight because I love the quality so much. They feel like they will last a lifetime.

Perfect fit and perfect look These pants are just the right fit, style, size, look, color and everything! I couldn't be happier. They are a loose fit, which seems to be in vogue these days, and have elastic waist bend in the back. It's a 29 inch inseam which is perfect seeing I'm 5'2" and pants usually run long. I could have gotten it a size up to get a little more room around the waist but it would have been too big in the legs. This is perfect and great addition to the wardrobe.

Sized up for a looser fit I normally wear a size small but sized up to a medium to ensure that these had a baggy fit on me. They were perfect. For size reference I am 5’3, 140 lbs and my lower measurements are 27-36. Lengthwise they were great for my height and the little bit of hang that I like. These pants are linen material and very well made. They aren’t see through at all and have such a comfortable fit. They do have an elastic waistband on the backside so I did not need a belt, they hung nicely on my hips. These are perfect for boho styled clothes and great for the summer weather. I love them and would recommend them.

Comfortable! These are so comfortable and soft! The material is a nice quality fabric, not cheap! They have decent control/thickness. My niece who is pictured is 5’7” for reference on length. They fit her true to size. She loves them!

Great I am 5’6 and 170 lbs. these pants are really comfy, the flex band in the top is a game changer. The pockets are nice and real , and the cargo pockets on the side are good for putting your phone or keys in. These are thick and would be good for outside jobs or the winter. I normally wear 14 or 16 . I got these in 16 plus and they are loose on me and I do need a belt but I feel 14 might be too tight. As you can see in the pictures they are the correct length when standing however these ride up SO much when you sit down and they become extreme high waters when sitting. I put them in the dryer and there was no shrinkage. I would like another pair in long.

Cute and comfortable fall boot I ordered these knee high kitten heel boots in the chocolate suede option Fit: They are true to size. I ordered my usual size 8 and they fit perfectly. They are not too tight, just enough extra space to be able to wiggle my toes but would definitely be a little snug with a thick pair of socks. The pointed toe part is long enough to give space for your toes without them being crammed together. I’m 5’6 and the top of the boot comes to a few inches under my knee. They do not slouch down while you’re wearing. The calf part does not have stretch to it and does not have much room to spare. I do not have large calves and tend to not have any issues with the fit of boots (ie I don’t usually have to look for wide calf boots) So if you do, these might or be great for you. I can maybe fit one finger in the extra space at the most. You may be able to tuck thin pants in if you want, but may be a bit difficult with thicker jeans. Will definitely be best for pairing with skirts and dresses. Quality/look: They look exactly as pictured and are a true chocolate brown. The bottoms of the shoes are a softer plastic (not the super cheap black plastic that makes loud clacking sounds and is slippery) These are a step up from super cheap boots, I think around a $40 price range is fair for these. The zipper zips and unzips very smoothly and unzips to the very bottom so they are very easy to put on and take off. Comfort: They are surprisingly very comfortable! The little heel is thick enough to walk on easily, the arch is not extreme so after walking in them for a bit there were no issues. No hard parts poking into my ankle and no rubbing. Will be a great outfit staple, especially for fall. Overall I would recommend these boots! A cute, comfy wardrobe staple with a timeless look.

Nice pants - good for lounging or going out. Great pants. It looks stylish yet casual. I’ve worn it lounging around the house as well as going out with a cute crop sweater. The length is great for me (5’3”).

Super comfortable pants! These pants are very comfortable! You could even wear them to bed. I wore these for a very long day at work, and they were not binding around the waist, plus the legs are loose and flow nicely when walking. The style length and nice dark green color match a wide variety of footwear. When I washed these, I tossed them in the washer on cold and then in the hot dryer for about 4 minutes. Then I hung them to dry, and they look great - no ironing needed! These do have a drawstring, but I just let it hang because the elastic was fine for my fit. I am going to be wearing these every week. For your reference, I am 5'7" (170cm) and 140 lbs (64kg) in the pictures, and I usually wear a size 2 in pants. UPDATE: These pants do NOT collect dog hair! My dog sheds a lot, but I can sit on my carpet, couch and bed without using the lint roller before I go out in these pants! It's just amazing! Even my shiny track pants pick up some dog hairs, but not these. UPDATE: I bought the navy blue on sale, and they are fabulous too!

Glad they're not actually linen These linen-like pants are my new go-to for comfort. I ordered up and am glad I did. I usually am at the top end of a small, but didn't want the pants to be too tight, so I ordered a Medium. They fit great. They hang to the perfect length, have some flow in the legs, and don't hug my seat too much. At 5'5" and 140lbs (roughly), they're a great fit and a great buy! I love the green. I'm so glad the material is not actually linen. They do look like linen, but are not 100% linen, which is great for washability. I have not tried them in the dryer yet, so I don't know if they will shrink. The wrinkles do eventually hang out, and the price is exceptional for excellent quality!

Super awesome pants Totally in love with these pants! They are so comfortable, a little stretchy and light weight without being see-through. I am 5'3" about 145 lbs and a 38" hip. I normally wear a medium and got the medium (based on the size chart) in Khaki. Obviously a little wrinkly from opening but it washes and dries well (doesn't shrink). I love the color and the waistband is comfortable too. It is a little long since I'm a shorty, but I can still wear them with flat and not drag on the ground too much. There are quite a few colors and the price is a little high, but I am definitely getting more of these pants in different colors. Highly recommend!

Look and Feel Great These are wonderful pants for summer. They are lightweight but no see through and the khaki color is perfect. They are true to size - small for 5;4”, 120 pounds. They would go great with a linen blouse or just a nice tee top. I washed them and they look as good as when I took them out of the package. They’re exactly what I wanted.

5'8, 375 lbs, Apple Shaped- Happy with my purchase, will be buying again! ☺️ My issue with jeans is that they will usually fit my legs but then can't button them. I don't have that problem with these jeans. These jeans have a good ratio of denim to stretch where it stretches enough in the waist if you need that extra inch but also still feels like denim and not jeggings. They are not the thickest material but also not thin. I like the look, I don't think they look cheap for the price. I took these pictures right after taking them out of the package. I am planning on wearing them to an event next week. I will update how they held up through sitting and standing and through a wash. So far I can say I really like them and am happy with my purchase. I hope these pictures can help give you a reference if you are someone shaped like me. UPDATE: The jeans held up great! Did not stretch out, was comfortable to sit, stand, move around for multiple hours. Updated to add pictures wearing the jeans at the event.

Beyond expectations I am almost 6ft and a size 22, it's hard to find plus size clothes that are also for long legs. I’m 5’4 130ish and I got a size 2 in these. I love them. I usually buy men’s stuff but sometimes I can’t get it small enough and these definitely fit better/are more flattering. Loose Fit HUGE compared with Original Fit The product description for Carhartt Women's Rugged Flex Loose Fit Canvas Work Pant says, "Loose Fit, previously known as Original Fit, is a label update in name only. Loose and Original size and fit remains the same." Not so! I love my size 6 Original fit (tan) so I bought a size 6 Loose (black; I also measured myself first). See the tan photo: fitted but not tight or loose. Compare the black photo: yes, that is my entire arm stuffed down the leg hole (along with my leg) up to my elbow. :/ Love Carhartt quality, so I ordered the size 4 (I am 5'7", fluctuate 130-135#, usually wear an 8 in pants). Edit: Just got the size 4 (4! I usually wear an 8), and it fits me! Upgraded my rating. So, despite the manufacturer claim that the new "Loose Fit" fit "remains the same" as the "Original Fit", know that (for me), a size 4 "Loose" fits like the size 6 (Fall, prior to COVID) "Original."

It's pretty thin but I am wearing spanks from my knee to under my bra so nothing's going to show. The wave of color at the lower midsection looks a little strange in person, it's almost blurry and it draws attention to the area if you have lumps there. I am 5'3 and have a 2.7" heel on and it's the perfect length. My bust is a 43 and it's too big there but I can take it in easily. I may have been able to go down a size but didn't want it to be skin tight either. I have a 40" waist and the waistline looks okay in the front but there's some looseness and bunching in the back. Bought this for a tropical gala fundraiser in the FL Keys and it's perfect. Delivery was early.

I'm instantly nearly 3" taller without feeling like I'm going to fall! I have been so eager to receive these platform knee high boots. Just in time for the fall and winter weather! I'm not all that tall...I like to say I'm 5'5" but with age it appears I'm now 5'4" which poses a problem when I go to concerts which are always standing room and everyone is so tall I cannot see the stage. This elevates me nearly 3" and the whole platform is nearly 2" meaning the angle of tilt on my heels and the subsequent pain that shoots up my body is diminished, because the angle of the high heel part for me in only about 1.5". So I get to be taller without the pain of traditional high heels. I am usually a 7.5 but I think with age my feet spread out so I got a size 8 and it's plenty roomy. Once I put my orthotics in (gosh, I'm showing my age, aren't I?) these fit perfectly. I can easily go all day wearing these. I love the traditional boot style, clean, rounded toe box, goes all the way up to the knee, the zipper is high quality and even fits on over jeans. Bring on the colder weather and cooler fashion. And the concerts too!

Great quality! Love the fit of these! I originally ordered them for candy cane day at my school but I find myself wearing them once a week! I even ordered them in another color. I’m 5’2 125lb and I ordered a medium because I like a baggy look. I have to roll them at the waist one time because they’re a tad long. The quality is great! Run really big but still look cute on I'm 5'1" 110 pounds and went with my normal size of small which ran really big on me. I wish they offered an xsmall. These are wide legged and meant to run bigger but these are really big to the point I could barely tie them tight enough to stay up. Luckily they still look cute but I have to roll them one time. These are made of good quality comfortable material. The length is longer on me because I'm so short. I have these high waisted. Aside from the size these are as advertised. I'm not sure how they fit the model so well and still look slim considering I'm smaller than the model. I wouldn't size up. Some may even need to size down if a smaller size is available. I do recommend these even though they run big because they still look good.

Nice quality - Worth a try! I bought a 2-Short anticipating a fit, but they were too big. They're marked 2S, Waist 26 and Length 30. The rise is ~9.75" and fit just under my waist - which is a little higher than my idea of a mid-rise. On the plus side, the fabric seems to be of good quality - strong denim and good weight. Wish they came in a size 0, I'd give them another try. I ended up buying Levi's 315 Shaping Bootcut style in a 25 Short (30 inseam), and they fit perfect - they have a slightly lower rise too at 9.25". If you're looking for a nice fitting pair of jeans that aren't skinny or baggy, then either of these jeans are worth a try.

Good Color and Fit for 5’5” These were a good purchase. I am 5 feet 5 inches and weigh 219 lbs. I got a size 18W short. They are the perfect length for the shoes I will typically wear them with. They are a nice deep (not faded) black color. They have good stretch. I normally wear a size 20W but an 18W fit well with the stretch. They are very comfortable. The only thing I can’t on is the washing. Typically I buy one pair of black jeans a year and have to replace them due to fading after washing. I am going to try and keep these ones from fading if I can.

Expect some shrinkage in length I have purchased several pairs of these jeans in different colors and they all fit great with plenty of stretch. Be aware that these jeans do vary slightly from one color to another. I noticed the darker colors seem to run slightly larger than the lighter ones. I am short (5’-2”) so I bought the short inseam (actually 30” not 29” as noted in description), as recommended by the size chart. Upon trying them on, the leg length fell perfectly at my heal. After a few washes the length is now above my shoes and looks awkward. I then purchased the medium inseam (actually 32” not 31” as noted in description) which was a few inches too long. I had to fold them so they wouldn’t drag on the floor or bunch up at my shoes. After a few washes, sure enough, they shrank and the length is now perfect. I would recommend purchasing the longer inseam if you are in between the heights noted on the size chart. Also, if you are like me and have bigger thighs, the material will pill quickly in the crotch area as well. I snapped a photo after a few months of wear, for reference. Overall, I am satisfied with the jeans and would purchase again.
